model_tasks: employee submits an office supply request
immediate supervisor returns request to the employee
request goes to the purchase department
the purchase department chooses a different vendor
the system  generates a purchase order
the system sends a purchase order
the system waits for the product delivery

additional_tasks: immediate supervisor returns request to the employee

model: employee submits an office supply request
request goes to the purchase department

two_wrong_sequences_best_pair.task_a: immediate supervisor returns request to the employee

user_text:
The process begins when an employee submits a request for office supplies. Once the request is submitted, it is registered in the system. After registration, the request is sent to the employee's immediate supervisor, who receives it for review.

The immediate supervisor then decides whether to approve the request. If the supervisor does not approve the request, it is returned to the employee with comments. The employee reviews these comments and decides whether to make any changes or resubmit the request. This decision point is revisited until the request is either approved or the process is otherwise concluded.

If the immediate supervisor approves the request, it is forwarded to the purchase department. The purchase department then makes quotations to determine the best options for fulfilling the request. After obtaining quotations, the department selects a vendor. If the selected vendor is not suitable, the purchase department may choose a different vendor. This decision is made until a suitable vendor is selected.

Once a vendor is confirmed, the system generates a purchase order. The purchase order is then sent to the vendor. After sending the purchase order, the system waits for the delivery of the products. Once the products are delivered, the system receives an invoice from the vendor.

After receiving the invoice, the system sends a notification to the user, informing them of the completion of the process. This marks the end of the process.
output_text:
The process begins when an employee submits a request for office supplies. Once the request is submitted, it is registered in the system. After registration, the immediate supervisor receives the request for review. The supervisor then approves the request.

Following the approval, two parallel actions occur. First, the immediate supervisor returns the request to the employee, who then reviews any comments provided. Second, the request is forwarded to the purchase department.

In the purchase department, the team makes quotations for the requested supplies and selects a vendor. At this point, a decision is made: if the selected vendor is not suitable, the purchase department may choose a different vendor. Once a vendor is confirmed, the system generates a purchase order.

The system then sends the purchase order to the vendor and waits for the delivery of the products. Upon receiving the products, the system also receives the invoice. After these steps are completed, the system sends a notification to the user, informing them of the status of their request. The process concludes with this notification.
